roadmap.task: Bugfix: For users in the UK, when we switched to BST (UTC+1) on March 29, 2026, handleUpdateNote receives a date like 2026-03-31 (parsed via parseISO as midnight local time), calling .toISOString() converts it to UTC, shifting it back to 2026-03-30T23:00:00.000Z causing events not being able to be completed.
Auto Update (will be replaced in future with microsoft store distribution)
Scaling CalendarPlus down in scale now formats proeprly on smaller screens (smoothly)
Added manual height Scaling to each widget (drag to resize)

Refined AI Briefing to be more relevant when refering to events, instead of saying focus on x then y, will now pull from descriptions and specify formatting (e.g., welldone for x, remember to bring y, almost finished with z)
Task Completion Analytics (interactive stock grapghs showing completion rates over time)
Enhanced Data Visualization with Charts (e.g., more options for event categories)
Global Keyboard Shortcuts (Ctrl+c, Ctrl+v and Ctrl+a now all work in app)
Dynamic AI Briefing (will now change based on toggled state of Completed/Missed Tasks)
Self-hosted Website
Data Persistence & Sync (Migration to v2)
Mobile Support (PWA)
Microsoft Store Distribution
Advanced Appearance Settings (Custom Fonts, Extended Accent Colors)
Dashboard Edit Mode (Rearrange & Add Widgets)
Refactor API Logic (Robust AI Model Fallback)
Third-Party Calendar Imports (Selective Import)
AI Quick Note with Recurring Options
AI tone settings for briefing (e.g., formal, casual)
Sleep predictor to show you when youd wake up based on sleep cycles (slider based on calendar)
